name: Google Places and Routes
description: Built-in Google Places lookup and Google Routes ETA tools.
capabilities: Searches Google Places for open status, phone, address, and ratings.
Calculates Google Routes travel time, distance, and traffic-aware ETAs.

built_in_toggle.shared_description: Expose Google Places lookup and Google Routes travel-time tools. Requires a Google Maps API key.
built_in_toggle.profile_disable_description: Prevents this profile from using Google Places and Routes tools.
